chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Civil Transfer Application No.39 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on C.M.A 1870/18 2. For hearing of main case 18.01.2019 Mr. Agha Ghulam Abbas, Advocate for applicant...... Learned Counsel does not press this Civil Transfer Application and to that effect he has filed a statement dated 16.01.2019. Accordingly, the instant Civil Transfer Application is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
